description: Sinnaiha Kamalakumar Vs. Director General of Customs and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Sinnaiha Kamalakumar Vs. Director General of Customs and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner had purchased confiscated certain gold items at a tender auction at Customs, who had charged VAT on the basis of imported goods; the Petitioner challenged the same in this writ court. Held - whether sold within the territory of Sri Lanka, once smuggled or imported with a license, VAT depends on the country of origin, not as a local product
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
